accepted.reason: Topic-sequence initialization and term/topic count aggregation are high-signal probabilistic modeling kernels.
All-pairs gravitational acceleration and velocity-Verlet updates provide strong numerical simulation loops.
Affine transform composition and point mapping represent reusable geometry-control kernels.
Nesterov/Adam parameter update logic is central iterative optimization material for model training loops.
Action-scoring with recurrent action-state coupling is a compact sequential decision kernel.
Typed buffer replacement/copy patterns around triangulation IO are practical memory-layout transformation helpers.
